Site.description: Discover and book hotels worldwide with intelligent search, real-time availability, and personalized AI recommendations.

Ai.pageDescription: Tell us about your trip — destination, dates, budget, or vibe — and Novigo AI will recommend stays from our catalog and help you decide faster.
Ai.emptyDescription: Ask for hotel ideas, then tap a card to preview the stay without leaving chat.
Ai.askAboutHotel: Tell me more about {hotelName} — rooms, location, and who it's best for.
Ai.noResultsDescription: Could you ask a bit more clearly? Add destination, dates, budget, or the kind of stay you want.

cards.askAboutHotel: Ask Novigo AI about this hotel

mandarin-oriental-bodrum.tagline: Aegean luxury with private bays and world-class spa rituals.
mandarin-oriental-bodrum.description: Set along the Bodrum coastline, Mandarin Oriental pairs minimalist design with turquoise views, fine dining, and a serene spa experience. Ideal for couples and premium leisure stays seeking privacy without sacrificing access to the marina.

ciragan-palace.tagline: Ottoman palace elegance on the Bosphorus shoreline.
ciragan-palace.description: Çırağan Palace Kempinski offers iconic Istanbul luxury in a historic waterfront setting. Expect grand interiors, Bosphorus-facing rooms, and exceptional service for honeymoons, celebrations, and high-end city breaks.

maxx-royal-antalya.tagline: All-inclusive resort comfort on the Belek coast.
maxx-royal-antalya.description: Maxx Royal Belek is built for families and sun-seekers who want everything on property — beaches, pools, kids clubs, and multiple restaurants — with a polished resort feel and strong guest reviews.

four-seasons-sultanahmet.tagline: Boutique luxury steps from Sultanahmet's historic core.
four-seasons-sultanahmet.description: Housed in a restored neoclassical building, Four Seasons Sultanahmet delivers intimate luxury near Hagia Sophia and the Blue Mosque. Perfect for culture-focused travelers who want walkable old city access with refined comfort.

highlights.0: Walkable to Hagia Sophia & Grand Bazaar
